title: SEIF Task Envelope
description: Typed unit of work (A2A Task object, adopted semantically). The ONLY legal way to request agent work. The kernel validates this before dispatch and rejects malformed or out-of-scope tasks deterministically.

workspace.description: MWP workspace id this task is scoped to

inputs.description: refs to context/evidence provided to the worker

writable_scope.description: glob paths the worker may modify; empty array = READ-ONLY task

acceptance.description: acceptance tests / criteria that gate ACCEPTED

output_contract.description: artifact schema id or explicit description of required output

assigned_to.description: capability or agent id; resolved by routing policy

protected.description: true if completing this task performs a protected action (requires Neo approval before AUTHORIZED)
